_comment: PoE Maven Boss Witness Guide. Maven watches you kill bosses and creates Invitations from grouped witnesses.
_note: Each invitation requires 10 witnesses of each boss in its group. Killing a boss with Maven watching counts as 1 witness.
how_maven_works: Unlock Maven by completing A8 story. Activate Maven's Beacon on a map device to invite her. She watches you kill bosses. After 10 witnesses for each boss in a group, she creates an Invitation. Defeat all invitation fights to unlock The Maven herself.

invitations.name: The Formed

witness_groups.found_in: Drox-influenced maps (Warlord influence, typically Haewark Hamlet / Tirn's End regions)
witness_groups.notes: Warlord-influenced maps have yellow cracks on their icon. T11+ for reliable spawns.

witness_groups.found_in: Redeemer-influenced maps (Redeemer influence, typically Glennach Cairns / Lira Arthain regions)
witness_groups.notes: Redeemer-influenced maps have blue snowflake patterns on their icon.

witness_groups.found_in: Hunter-influenced maps (Hunter influence, typically Lex Ejoris / Lex Proxima regions)
witness_groups.notes: Hunter-influenced maps have green vines on their icon.

witness_groups.found_in: Crusader-influenced maps (Crusader influence, typically New Vastir / Glennach Cairns regions)
witness_groups.notes: Crusader-influenced maps have purple crosses on their icon.

invitations.reward: Fighting The Formed gives a chance at Elderslayer unique items (e.g., Warlord's Mark ring mods) and Maven's Writ progress.
invitations.notes: Requires completing all 4 Conqueror storyline defeats first to unlock regional influences.

invitations.name: The Twisted

witness_groups.found_in: Shaper Guardian maps (T16): Chimera, Hydra, Minotaur, Phoenix — then the Shaper himself (T17 equivalent via fragments)
witness_groups.notes: Kill all 4 Shaper Guardians to unlock the Shaper fragment. Each guardian counts as a separate witness group.

witness_groups.found_in: Elder Guardian maps (T16): Eradicator, Enslaver, Constrictor, Purifier — then the Elder (via fragments)
witness_groups.notes: Elder Guardians are accessible via Synthesis fragments on the map device.

witness_groups.found_in: The Cortex (Synthesis map boss, T17 equivalent)
witness_groups.notes: Access via 4 Synthesis Reliquary fragments on the map device.

invitations.reward: Shaper/Elder/Synthesis unique items. Maven's Writ progress.
invitations.notes: Requires Shaper and Elder storylines to be completed. Fragment sets must be assembled separately.

invitations.name: The Hidden

witness_groups.found_in: Elder Guardian map set (Synthesis fragments + map device)
Elder Guardian map set
Elder Guardian map set
Elder Guardian map set

invitations.reward: Synthesis and Elder Guardian unique items. Maven's Writ progress.
invitations.notes: All four Elder Guardians must each be witnessed 10 times.

invitations.name: The Forgotten

witness_groups.found_in: Xoph's Breachstone (map device: 1× Xoph's Breachstone)
witness_groups.notes: Requires Xoph's Breachstone or Charged/Enriched/Pure tier. Maven watches inside the Breachstone domain.

witness_groups.found_in: Tul's Breachstone
Esh's Breachstone
Uul-Netol's Breachstone
Chayula's Breachstone
witness_groups.notes: Chayula is the hardest Breach Lord — tanky and chaotic damage. Prepare accordingly.

invitations.reward: Breach unique items (Berek's rings, Xoph's unique items). Maven's Writ progress.
invitations.notes: Each Breachstone run counts as 1 witness for that Breach Lord. Requires 50 Breachstone runs per lord (10 witnesses × 5 lords). Expensive to complete.

invitations.name: The Elderslayers

witness_groups.found_in: Complete all 4 Conqueror storyline cycles (A1-A8), then fight Sirus at the centre of the Atlas (costs 4 Conqueror sets)
witness_groups.notes: Sirus is T17 difficulty. The highest difficulty regular boss. Requires all 4 Conquerors to be defeated in one cycle.

invitations.reward: Sirus unique items (Bottled Faith, Watcher's Eye via Baran path). Maven's Writ progress.
invitations.notes: Only Sirus is in this group. 10 Sirus kills required.

invitations.name: The Feared

witness_groups.found_in: Alluring Abyss (4× Sacrifice at Dusk/Midnight/Dawn/Noon)
witness_groups.notes: Uber Atziri is a T16 pinnacle boss. Reflections are lethal — do not hit during split phase.

witness_groups.found_in: The Shaper's Realm at T17 using fragments (4× Guardian fragments + Elder fragment)
witness_groups.notes: Shaper and Elder fight together. Highly demanding mechanically.

witness_groups.found_in: The Cortex (4× Synthesis Reliquary Key fragments)
Chayula's Pure Breachstone or Charged Breachstone
Standard Sirus fight (4 Conqueror cycle)

invitations.reward: Maven's Writ, rare invitation-exclusive drops, Maven currency items.
invitations.notes: The Feared is the most difficult invitation. Fighting and defeating The Maven herself requires completing The Feared plus all other invitations. The Maven drops Elevated Modifiers and unique jewels.

maven_fight.requirement: Complete all invitations (The Formed, The Twisted, The Hidden, The Forgotten, The Elderslayers, The Feared) to unlock The Maven fight.
maven_fight.access: 10× Maven's Writ on the map device opens The Maven's Crucible.
maven_fight.rewards: Maven's Writ (for future runs), Elevated Modifier items (the only source), unique jewels (The Shaper's Presence, Voices, etc.).
maven_fight.notes: The Maven is one of the hardest pinnacle bosses. Her memory game phase requires memorizing and avoiding specific floor tiles. Highly rewarding.

tips: Maven's Beacon must be active on the map device when you enter a map for the kill to count as a witness.
Maven will occasionally invite herself mid-map to observe — this still counts as a witness even without the Beacon.
Invitation fights drop Maven's Writ shards (4 shards = 1 Writ). Collect Writs to fight The Maven.
You can witness the same boss multiple times in one session — run influenced maps in bulk for efficient witnessing.
The Feared invitation requires the highest investment. Consider completing easier invitations first to practice the fight format.
